title: Part-Time English Teacher
description:
Job Summary

We are seeking a dedicated and enthusiastic Part-Time English Teacher to deliver engaging and effective lessons that support students’ academic progress and foster a positive learning environment.

Responsibilities

  • Deliver English lessons aligned with the centre’s curriculum and lesson plans to primary and/or secondary school students
  • Develop and prepare teaching materials that engage students and are appropriate for their age and learning level
  • Monitor and assess students’ learning progress, providing constructive feedback to enhance their language skills
  • Maintain classroom discipline by implementing strategies that promote a positive and focused learning environment
  • Communicate clearly and professionally with parents about students’ progress, attendance, and areas for improvement
  • Participate actively in internal meetings and training sessions to continuously improve teaching practices
  • Manage punctuality and attendance, notifying the centre in advance of any leave to ensure smooth scheduling

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Local or prominent university graduate in English teaching field or relevant fields
  • Strong communication (both spoken and written) and interpersonal skills
  • Required to work on weekends
  • Prior teaching or tutoring experience in English language instruction
  • Relevant qualifications such as English, Education, or TESOL certifications
  • Strong proficiency in spoken and written English
  • Patience, responsibility, and commitment to supporting students’ learning outcomes
  • Ability to commit reliably to a regular weekly teaching schedule

Employer questions

  • How would you rate your English language skills?
  • Describe your right to work in Singapore?
  • What's your expected monthly basic salary?
  • How many years of experience do you have as a Tutor?
  • Are you available to work on weekends or public holidays?

postedCompany.description:
Pureon Education Pte. Ltd. is an education centre based in Singapore, dedicated to providing high-quality academic support to students. We focus on building strong foundations, improving learning confidence, and helping students achieve sustainable academic progress.

Our programmes are designed to be structured, effective, and student-centred. We place strong emphasis on clear communication, responsible teaching, and a supportive learning environment for both students and educators.

At Pureon Education, we value professionalism, commitment, and long-term collaboration. We work closely with our teachers to ensure they are well-supported with clear expectations, teaching resources, and a respectful working environment.
postedCompany.name: PUREON EDUCATION PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
